search_document:
User Request: Supplier performance.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Supplier Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics over time
Title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
Title: Total Supplier Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Aggregate revenue from all suppliers
Title: Supplier Order Volume
Type: chart
Description: Number of orders placed with each supplier
Title: Supplier Delivery Performance
Type: chart
Description: On-time delivery rates for each supplier

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Supplier Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID

sql_queries.title: Supplier Order Volume
sql_queries.description: Number of orders placed with each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Supplier Delivery Performance
sql_queries.description: On-time delivery rates for each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.ShippedDate <= o.RequiredDate THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OnTimeDeliveryRate FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY OnTimeDeliveryRate DESC
